Pali: 64. Dutiyasikkhamānasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 64. Ordaining a trained candidate without approval 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in the Jeta Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhuniyo dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ sikkhamānaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpenti. 
English (brahmali, published): At that time the nuns were giving the full admission to trainee nuns who had trained for two years in the six rules, but who had not been approved by the Sangha. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.3
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo evamāhaṁsu—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns said, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.4
Pali: “etha, sikkhamānā, imaṁ jānātha, imaṁ detha, imaṁ āharatha, iminā attho, imaṁ kappiyaṁ karothā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “Come, trainee nuns, find out about this,” “Give this,” “Bring this,” “There’s need for this,” or “Make this allowable.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.5
Pali: Tā evamāhaṁsu—
English (brahmali, published): But they replied, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.6
Pali: “na mayaṁ, ayye, sikkhamānā, bhikkhuniyo mayan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “Venerables, we’re not trainee nuns. We’re nuns.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.7
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized them, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhuniyo dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ sikkhamānaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpessantī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns give the full admission to trainee nuns who have trained for two years in the six rules, but who haven’t been approved by the Sangha?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ sikkhamānaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpentī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that nuns do this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ sikkhamānaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpessanti. 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.14
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): After rebuking them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.15
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—
English (brahmali, published): he gave a teaching and addressed the monks: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.16
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya sikkhamānāya vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ dātuṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): “Monks, approval is required for the full admission of a trainee nun who has trained for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.17
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And it should be given like this. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.18
Pali: Tāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya sikkhamānāya saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā bhikkhunīnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—
English (brahmali, published): After approaching the Sangha of nuns, that trainee nun should arrange her upper robe over one shoulder and pay respect at the feet of the nuns. She should then squat on her heels, raise her joined palms, and say: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.19
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, ayye, itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā sikkhamānā saṅghaṁ vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ yācāmī’ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Venerables, I, the trainee nun so-and-so, who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, ask the Sangha for approval to be fully admitted.’ 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.20
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And she should ask a second 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.21
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): and a third time. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.22
Pali: Byattāya bhikkhuniyā paṭibalāya saṅgho ñāpetabbo—
English (brahmali, published): A competent and capable nun should then inform the Sangha: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.23
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen.

English (brahmali, published): The trainee nun so-and-so, who has trained under venerable so-and-so for two years in the six rules, is asking the Sangha for approval to be fully admitted.

English (brahmali, published): If the Sangha is ready, it should give approval for the trainee nun so-and-so, who has trained for two years in the six rules, to be fully admitted.

Pali: Esā ñatti. 
English (brahmali, published): This is the motion.

English (brahmali, published): The trainee nun so-and-so, who has trained under venerable so-and-so for two years in the six rules, is asking the Sangha for approval to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.29
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya sikkhamānāya vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ deti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha gives approval for the trainee nun so-and-so, who has trained for two years in the six rules, to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.30
Pali: Yassā ayyāya khamati itthannāmāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya sikkhamānāya vuṭṭhānasammutiyā dānaṁ, sā tuṇhassa; 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who approves of giving approval for the trainee nun so-and-so, who has trained for two years in the six rules, to be fully admitted should remain silent. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.31
Pali: yassā nakkhamati, sā bhāseyya.

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.32
Pali: Dinnā saṅghena itthannāmāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya sikkhamānāya vuṭṭhānasammuti; 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha has given approval for the trainee nun so-and-so, who has trained for two years in the six rules, to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.33
Pali: khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha approves and is therefore silent. I will remember it thus.’”

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:1.36.1

Pali: Dve vassānīti

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.9

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.10
Pali: ñattidutiyena kammena vuṭṭhānasammuti na dinnā hoti. 
English (brahmali, published): approval to be fully admitted has not been given through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and one announcement. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.11

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.13
Pali: “Vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.14
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.15
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.16
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.17
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.18.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.19
Pali: Dhammakamme vematikā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.20
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as illegitimate, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.21
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as legitimate, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.22
Pali: Adhammakamme vematikā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.23
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.24.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.25
Pali: dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ sikkhamānaṁ saṅghena sammataṁ vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives the full admission to a trainee nun who has trained for two years in the six rules and who has been approved by the Sangha; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.26
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.27
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc64:2.28
Pali: Catutthasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The fourth training rule is finished.

Pali: 65. Gihigatasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 65. Ordaining a married girl under twelve 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhuniyo ūnadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ vuṭṭhāpenti. 
English (brahmali, published): the nuns were giving the full admission to married girls less than twelve years old. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.3
Pali: Tā akkhamā honti sītassa uṇhassa jighacchāya pipāsāya ḍaṁsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṁ duruttānaṁ durāgatānaṁ vacanapathānaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): They were unable to endure cold and heat; hunger and thirst; contact with horseflies, mosquitoes, wind, the burning sun, and creeping animals and insects; rude and unwelcome speech; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.4

English (brahmali, published): and they were unable to bear up with bodily feelings that are painful, severe, sharp, and destructive of life. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.5
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized them,

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.7

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.11
Pali: Ūnadvādasavassā, bhikkhave, gihigatā akkhamā hoti sītassa uṇhassa jighacchāya pipāsāya ḍaṁsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṁ duruttānaṁ durāgatānaṁ vacanapathānaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): A married girl less than twelve years old is unable to endure cold and heat; hunger and thirst; contact with horseflies, mosquitoes, wind, the burning sun, and creeping animals and insects; rude and unwelcome speech; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.12

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.13

English (brahmali, published): But a married girl who is twelve years old is able to endure these things. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.14

English: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.15
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” …

English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:1.17.1

English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun gives the full admission to a married girl who is less than twelve years old, she commits an offense entailing confession.’”

English (brahmali, published): A:

Pali: yā yādisā …pe…

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.1.5

English (brahmali, published): A married girl:

Pali: purisantaragatā vuccati. 
English (brahmali, published): one who has gone to the place of a man is what is meant. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.1.9
Pali: Vuṭṭhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Gives the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.1.10
Pali: upasampādeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.1.11
Pali: “Vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct.

Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.1.13
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.1.14

English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.1.15
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.2.1
Pali: Ūnadvādasavassāya ūnadvādasavassasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is less than twelve years old, and the nun perceives her as less, yet she gives her the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.2.2
Pali: Ūnadvādasavassāya vematikā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is less than twelve years old, but the nun is unsure of it, yet she gives her the full admission, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.2.3
Pali: Ūnadvādasavassāya paripuṇṇasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, anāpatti. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is less than twelve years old, but the nun perceives her as more, and she gives her the full admission, there is no offense. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.2.4
Pali: Paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya ūnadvādasavassasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is more than twelve years old, but the nun perceives her as less, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.2.5
Pali: Paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya vematikā, āpatti dukkaṭassa.

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.2.6
Pali: Paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya paripuṇṇasaññā, anāpatti. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is more than twelve years old, and the nun perceives her as more, there is no offense. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.3.2
Pali: ūnadvādasavassaṁ paripuṇṇasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives the full admission to a girl less than twelve years old, but she perceives her as more; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.3.3
Pali: paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ paripuṇṇasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti,

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc65:2.3.6

Pali: Gabbhinivagga 
English (brahmali, published): The subchapter on pregnant women 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:0.5
Pali: 66. Dutiyagihigatasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 66. Ordaining an untrained married girl 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in the Jeta Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu asikkhitasikkhaṁ vuṭṭhāpenti. 
English (brahmali, published): At that time the nuns were giving the full admission to married girls who were more than twelve years old, but who had not trained for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.3
Pali: Tā bālā honti abyattā na jānanti kappiyaṁ vā akappiyaṁ vā. 
English (brahmali, published): They were ignorant and incompetent, and they did not know what was allowable and what was not. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.4
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns give the full admission to married girls who are more than twelve years old, but who haven’t trained for two years in the six rules?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu asikkhitasikkhaṁ vuṭṭhāpentī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that nuns do this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.7
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.8
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.9
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu asikkhitasikkhaṁ vuṭṭhāpessanti. 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.10
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.11
Pali: vigarahitvā dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—
English (brahmali, published): After rebuking them … he gave a teaching and addressed the monks: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.12
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ dātuṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): “Monks, approval is required for a married girl who is more than twelve years old to train for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.13
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And the approval is to be given like this. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.14
Pali: Tāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā bhikkhunīnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—
English (brahmali, published): After approaching the Sangha of nuns, that married girl who is more than twelve years old should arrange her upper robe over one shoulder and pay respect at the feet of the nuns. She should then squat on her heels, raise her joined palms, and say: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.15
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, ayye, itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassā gihigatā saṅghaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ yācāmī’ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Venerables, I, so-and-so, a married girl who is more than twelve years old, am training under venerable so-and-so. I ask the Sangha for approval to train for two years in the six rules.’ 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.16
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And she should ask a second 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.17
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): and a third time. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.18
Pali: Byattāya bhikkhuniyā paṭibalāya saṅgho ñāpetabbo—
English (brahmali, published): A competent and capable nun should then inform the Sangha: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.19
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.20
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassā gihigatā saṅghaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): The married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old, is asking the Sangha for approval to train for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.21
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ saṅgho itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ dadeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): If the Sangha is ready, it should give approval to the married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old, to train for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.22
Pali: Esā ñatti. 
English (brahmali, published): This is the motion. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.23
Pali: Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.24
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassā gihigatā saṅghaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): The married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old, is asking the Sangha for approval to train for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.25
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ deti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha gives approval to the married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old, to train for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.26
Pali: Yassā ayyāya khamati itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiyā dānaṁ, sā tuṇhassa; 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who approves of giving approval to the married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old, to train for two years in the six rules should remain silent. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.27
Pali: yassā nakkhamati, sā bhāseyya. 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who doesn’t approve should speak up. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.28
Pali: Dinnā saṅghena itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammuti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha has given approval to the married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old, to train for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.29
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha approves and is therefore silent. I will remember it thus.’ 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.30
Pali: Sā paripuṇṇadvādasavassā gihigatā evaṁ vadehīti vattabbā—
English (brahmali, published): That married girl, who is more than twelve years old, should be told to say this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.31
Pali: “pāṇātipātā veramaṇiṁ dve vassāni avītikkamma samādānaṁ samādiyāmi …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): ‘I undertake to abstain from killing living beings for two years without transgression. … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.32
Pali: vikālabhojanā veramaṇiṁ dve vassāni avītikkamma samādānaṁ samādiyāmī”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): I undertake to abstain from eating at the wrong time for two years without transgression.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.33
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā tā bhikkhuniyo anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā dubbharatāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): Then, after rebuking those nuns in many ways, the Buddha spoke in dispraise of being difficult to support … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.34
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:1.35.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu asikkhitasikkhaṁ vuṭṭhāpeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun gives the full admission to a married girl who is more than twelve years old, but who has not trained for two years in the six rules, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.5
Pali: Paripuṇṇadvādasavassā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Who is more than twelve years old: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.6
Pali: pattadvādasavassā. 
English (brahmali, published): who has reached twelve years of age. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.7
Pali: Gihigatā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): A married girl: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.8
Pali: purisantaragatā vuccati. 
English (brahmali, published): one who has gone to the place of a man is what is meant. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.9
Pali: Dve vassānīti 
English (brahmali, published): Two years: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.10
Pali: dve saṁvaccharāni. 
English (brahmali, published): two twelve-month periods. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.11
Pali: Asikkhitasikkhā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Who has not trained: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.12
Pali: sikkhā vā na dinnā hoti, dinnā vā sikkhā kupitā. 
English (brahmali, published): the training has not been given to her, or the training has been given to her, but she has failed in it. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.13
Pali: Vuṭṭhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Gives the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.14
Pali: upasampādeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.15
Pali: “Vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.16
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.17
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.18
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.19
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.20.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.21
Pali: Dhammakamme vematikā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.22
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as illegitimate, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.23
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as legitimate, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.24
Pali: Adhammakamme vematikā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.25
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.26.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.27
Pali: paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives the full admission to a married girl who is more than twelve years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.28
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.29
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc66:2.30
Pali: Chaṭṭhasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The sixth training rule is finished.

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:0.5
Pali: 67. Tatiyagihigatasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 67. Ordaining a trained married girl without approval 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in the Jeta Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpenti. 
English (brahmali, published): At that time the nuns were giving the full admission to married girls who were more than twelve years old and who had trained for two years in the six rules, but who had not been approved by the Sangha. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.3
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo evamāhaṁsu—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns said, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.4
Pali: “etha, sikkhamānā, imaṁ jānātha, imaṁ detha, imaṁ āharatha, iminā attho, imaṁ kappiyaṁ karothā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “Come, trainee nuns, find out about this,” “Give this,” “Bring this,” “There’s need for this,” or “Make this allowable.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.5
Pali: Tā evamāhaṁsu—
English (brahmali, published): But they replied, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.6
Pali: “na mayaṁ, ayye, sikkhamānā, bhikkhuniyo mayan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “Venerables, we’re not trainee nuns. We’re nuns.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.7
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized them, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpessantī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns give the full admission to married girls who are more than twelve years old and who have trained for two years in the six rules, but who haven’t been approved by the Sangha?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpentī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that nuns do this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpessanti. 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.14
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): After rebuking them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.15
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—
English (brahmali, published): he gave a teaching and addressed the monks: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.16
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ dātuṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): “Monks, approval is required for the full admission of a married girl who is more than twelve years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.17
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And it should be given like this. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.18
Pali: Tāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā bhikkhunīnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—
English (brahmali, published): After approaching the Sangha of nuns, that married girl who is more than twelve years old should arrange her upper robe over one shoulder and pay respect at the feet of the nuns. She should then squat on her heels, raise her joined palms, and say: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.19
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, ayye, itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassā gihigatā dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā, saṅghaṁ vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ yācāmī’ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Venerables, I, the married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, ask the Sangha for approval to be fully admitted.’ 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.20
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And she should ask a second 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.21
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): and a third time. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.22
Pali: Byattāya bhikkhuniyā paṭibalāya saṅgho ñāpetabbo. 
English (brahmali, published): A competent and capable nun should then inform the Sangha: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.23
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.24
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassā gihigatā dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā saṅghaṁ vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): The married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, is asking the Sangha for approval to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.25
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ dadeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): If the Sangha is ready, it should give approval for the married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules, to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.26
Pali: Esā ñatti. 
English (brahmali, published): This is the motion. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.27
Pali: Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.28
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassā gihigatā dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā saṅghaṁ vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): The married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, is asking the Sangha for approval to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.29
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ deti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha gives approval for the married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules, to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.30
Pali: Yassā ayyāya khamati itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya gihigatāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya vuṭṭhānasammutiyā dānaṁ, sā tuṇhassa; 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who approves of giving approval for the married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules, to be fully admitted should remain silent. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.31
Pali: yassā nakkhamati, sā bhāseyya. 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who doesn’t approve should speak up.

English (brahmali, published): The Sangha has given approval for the married girl so-and-so, who is more than twelve years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules, to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:1.33
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha approves and is therefore silent. I will remember it thus.’”

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.17
Pali: “Vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.18
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.19
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.20
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.21
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.22.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.23
Pali: Dhammakamme vematikā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.24
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as illegitimate, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.25
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as legitimate, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.26
Pali: Adhammakamme vematikā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.27
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.28.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.29
Pali: paripuṇṇadvādasavassaṁ gihigataṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ saṅghena sammataṁ vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives the full admission to a married girl who is more than twelve years old, who has trained for two years in the six rules, and who has been approved by the Sangha; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.30
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.31
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc67:2.32
Pali: Sattamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The seventh training rule is finished.

English translation sources:

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 
English (brahmali, published): Theravāda Collection on Monastic Law 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:0.2
Pali: Bhikkhunivibhaṅga 
English (brahmali, published): The Nuns’ Analysis 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 
English (brahmali, published): The chapter on offenses entailing confession 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:0.4
Pali: Gabbhinivagga 
English (brahmali, published): The subchapter on pregnant women 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:0.5
Pali: 68. Sahajīvinīsikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 68. Not guiding a disciple after ordination 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in the Jeta Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena thullanandā bhikkhunī sahajīviniṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā dve vassāni neva anuggaṇhāti na anuggaṇhāpeti. 
English (brahmali, published): At that time the nun Thullanandā gave the full admission to a disciple, but then, for the next two years, neither guided her nor had her guided. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.3
Pali: Tā bālā honti abyattā; 
English (brahmali, published): They were ignorant and incompetent, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.4
Pali: na jānanti kappiyaṁ vā akappiyaṁ vā. 
English (brahmali, published): and they did not know what was allowable and what was not. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.5
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized her, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.6
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ayyā thullanandā sahajīviniṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā dve vassāni neva anuggaṇhissati na anuggaṇhāpessatī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How can Venerable Thullanandā give the full admission to a disciple, and then neither guide her nor have her guided for two years?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, thullanandā bhikkhunī sahajīviniṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā dve vassāni neva anuggaṇhāti na anuggaṇhāpetī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that the nun Thullanandā does this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked her … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.10
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, thullanandā bhikkhunī sahajīviniṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā dve vassāni neva anuggaṇhissati na anuggaṇhāpessati. 
English (brahmali, published): “How can the nun Thullanandā do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.11
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.12
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:1.13.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī sahajīviniṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā dve vassāni neva anuggaṇheyya na anuggaṇhāpeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun gives the full admission to a disciple, and then, for the next two years, neither guides her nor has her guided, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.5
Pali: Sahajīvinī nāma 
English (brahmali, published): A disciple: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.6
Pali: saddhivihārinī vuccati. 
English (brahmali, published): a student is what is meant. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.7
Pali: Vuṭṭhāpetvāti 
English (brahmali, published): Gives the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.8
Pali: upasampādetvā. 
English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.9
Pali: Dve vassānīti 
English (brahmali, published): Two years: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.10
Pali: dve saṁvaccharāni. 
English (brahmali, published): two twelve-month periods. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.11
Pali: Neva anuggaṇheyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Neither guides her: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.12
Pali: na sayaṁ anuggaṇheyya uddesena paripucchāya ovādena anusāsaniyā. 
English (brahmali, published): she does not herself guide her—through recitation, through questioning, through instruction, through teaching. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.13
Pali: Na anuggaṇhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Nor has her guided: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.14
Pali: na aññaṁ āṇāpeyya 
English (brahmali, published): she does not ask anyone else. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.1.15
Pali: “dve vassāni neva anuggaṇhissāmi na anuggaṇhāpessāmī”ti dhuraṁ nikkhittamatte āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she thinks, “I’ll neither guide her nor have her guided for two years,” then by the mere fact of abandoning her duty, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.2.2
Pali: sati antarāye, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an obstacle; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.2.3
Pali: pariyesitvā na labhati, 
English (brahmali, published): if she searches for someone to guide her, but cannot find anyone; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.2.4
Pali: gilānāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is sick; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.2.5
Pali: āpadāsu, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an emergency; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.2.6
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.2.7
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc68:2.2.8
Pali: Aṭṭhamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The eighth training rule is finished.

English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:1.13.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī sahajīviniṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā neva vūpakāseyya na vūpakāsāpeyya antamaso chappañcayojanānipi, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun gives the full admission to a disciple, and then neither sends her away nor has her sent away at least 65 to 80 kilometers, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.5
Pali: Sahajīvinī nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Disciple: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.6
Pali: saddhivihārinī vuccati. 
English (brahmali, published): student is what is meant. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.7
Pali: Vuṭṭhāpetvāti 
English (brahmali, published): Gives the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.8
Pali: upasampādetvā. 
English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.9
Pali: Neva vūpakāseyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Neither sends her away: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.10
Pali: na sayaṁ vūpakāseyya. 
English (brahmali, published): she does not herself send her away. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.11
Pali: Na vūpakāsāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Nor has her sent away: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.12
Pali: na aññaṁ āṇāpeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): she does not ask anyone else to send her away. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.1.13
Pali: “Neva vūpakāsessāmi na vūpakāsāpessāmi antamaso chappañcayojanānipī”ti dhuraṁ nikkhittamatte āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she thinks, “I’ll neither send her away nor have her sent away, not even 65 to 80 kilometers,” then by the mere fact of abandoning her duty, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.2.2
Pali: sati antarāye, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an obstacle; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.2.3
Pali: pariyesitvā dutiyikaṁ bhikkhuniṁ na labhati, 
English (brahmali, published): if she searches for a companion nun for her, but cannot find anyone; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.2.4
Pali: gilānāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is sick; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.2.5
Pali: āpadāsu, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an emergency; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.2.6
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.2.7
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.2.8
Pali: Dasamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The tenth training rule is finished. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc70:2.2.9
Pali: Gabbhinivaggo sattamo. 
English (brahmali, published): The seventh subchapter on pregnant women is finished.

Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 
English (brahmali, published): Theravāda Collection on Monastic Law

English (brahmali, published): The Nuns’ Analysis

English (brahmali, published): The chapter on offenses entailing confession 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:0.4
Pali: Kumāribhūtavagga 
English (brahmali, published): The subchapter on unmarried women 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:0.5
Pali: 71. Kumāribhūtasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 71. Ordaining an unmarried woman under twenty 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in the Jeta Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhuniyo ūnavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ vuṭṭhāpenti. 
English (brahmali, published): At that time the nuns were giving the full admission to unmarried women less than twenty years old. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.3
Pali: Tā akkhamā honti sītassa uṇhassa jighacchāya pipāsāya ḍaṁsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṁ duruttānaṁ durāgatānaṁ vacanapathānaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): They were unable to endure cold and heat; hunger and thirst; contact with horseflies, mosquitoes, wind, the burning sun, and creeping animals and insects; rude and unwelcome speech; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.4
Pali: Uppannānaṁ sārīrikānaṁ vedanānaṁ dukkhānaṁ tibbānaṁ kharānaṁ kaṭukānaṁ asātānaṁ amanāpānaṁ pāṇaharānaṁ anadhivāsakajātikā honti. 
English (brahmali, published): and they were unable to bear up with bodily feelings that are painful, severe, sharp, and destructive of life. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.5
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized them, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.6
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhuniyo ūnavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ vuṭṭhāpessantī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns give the full admission to unmarried women less than twenty years old?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo ūnavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ vuṭṭhāpentī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that nuns do this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.10
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo ūnavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ vuṭṭhāpessanti. 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.11
Pali: Ūnavīsativassā, bhikkhave, kumāribhūtā akkhamā hoti sītassa uṇhassa …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): An unmarried woman less than twenty years old is unable to endure cold and heat; hunger and thirst; contact with horseflies, mosquitoes, wind, the burning sun, and creeping animals and insects; rude and unwelcome speech; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.12
Pali: pāṇaharānaṁ anadhivāsakajātikā hoti. 
English (brahmali, published): and she’s unable to bear up with bodily feelings that are painful, severe, sharp, and destructive of life. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.13
Pali: Vīsativassāva kho, bhikkhave, kumāribhūtā khamā hoti sītassa uṇhassa …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): But an unmarried woman who is twenty years old is able to endure these things. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.14
Pali: pāṇaharānaṁ adhivāsakajātikā hoti. 
English: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.15
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.16
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:1.17.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī ūnavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ vuṭṭhāpeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun gives the full admission to an unmarried woman who is less than twenty years old, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.5
Pali: Ūnavīsativassā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Who is less than twenty years old: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.6
Pali: appattavīsativassā. 
English (brahmali, published): who has not reached twenty years of age. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.7
Pali: Kumāribhūtā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): An unmarried woman: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.8
Pali: sāmaṇerī vuccati. 
English (brahmali, published): a novice nun is what is meant. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.9
Pali: Vuṭṭhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Gives the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.10
Pali: upasampādeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.11
Pali: “Vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.12
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.13
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.14
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.15
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.16.1
Pali: Ūnavīsativassāya ūnavīsativassasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is less than twenty years old, and the nun perceives her as less, yet she gives her the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.17
Pali: Ūnavīsativassāya vematikā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is less than twenty years old, but the nun is unsure of it, yet she gives her the full admission, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.18
Pali: Ūnavīsativassāya paripuṇṇasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, anāpatti. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is less than twenty years old, but the nun perceives her as more, and she gives her the full admission, there is no offense. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.19
Pali: Paripuṇṇavīsativassāya ūnavīsativassasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is more than twenty years old, but the nun perceives her as less, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.20
Pali: Paripuṇṇavīsativassāya vematikā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is more than twenty years old, but the nun is unsure of it, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.21
Pali: Paripuṇṇavīsativassāya paripuṇṇasaññā, anāpatti. 
English (brahmali, published): If the girl is more than twenty years old, and the nun perceives her as more, there is no offense. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.22.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.23
Pali: ūnavīsativassaṁ paripuṇṇasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives the full admission to a girl less than twenty years old, but she perceives her as more; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.24
Pali: paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ paripuṇṇasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives the full admission to a girl more than twenty years old, and she perceives her as more; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.25
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.26
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc71:2.27
Pali: Paṭhamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The first training rule is finished.

Pali: 72. Dutiyakumāribhūtasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 72. Ordaining an untrained unmarried woman 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in the Jeta Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu asikkhitasikkhaṁ vuṭṭhāpenti. 
English (brahmali, published): At that time the nuns were giving the full admission to unmarried women who were more than twenty years old, but who had not trained for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.3
Pali: Tā bālā honti abyattā; 
English (brahmali, published): They were ignorant and incompetent, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.4
Pali: na jānanti kappiyaṁ vā akappiyaṁ vā. 
English (brahmali, published): and they did not know what was allowable and what was not. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.5

English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized them, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.6
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu asikkhitasikkhaṁ vuṭṭhāpessantī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns give the full admission to unmarried women who are more than twenty years old, but who haven’t trained for two years in the six rules?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu asikkhitasikkhaṁ vuṭṭhāpentī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that nuns do this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.10

English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.11
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.12
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): After rebuking them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.13
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—
English (brahmali, published): he gave a teaching and addressed the monks: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.14
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṭṭhārasavassāya kumāribhūtāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ dātuṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): “Monks, approval is required for an unmarried woman who is eighteen years old to train for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.15
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And the approval is to be given like this. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.16
Pali: Tāya aṭṭhārasavassāya kumāribhūtāya saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā bhikkhunīnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—
English (brahmali, published): After approaching the Sangha of nuns, that unmarried woman who is eighteen years old should arrange her upper robe over one shoulder and pay respect at the feet of the nuns. She should then squat on her heels, raise her joined palms, and say: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.17
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, ayye, itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya aṭṭhārasavassā kumāribhūtā saṅghaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ yācāmī’ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Venerables, I, so-and-so, an unmarried woman who is eighteen years old, am training under venerable so-and-so. I ask the Sangha for approval to train for two years in the six rules.’ 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.18
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And she should ask a second 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.19
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): and a third time. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.20
Pali: Byattāya bhikkhuniyā paṭibalāya saṅgho ñāpetabbo—
English (brahmali, published): A competent and capable nun should then inform the Sangha: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.21
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.22
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya aṭṭhārasavassā kumāribhūtā saṅghaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): The unmarried woman so-and-so, who is eighteen years old, is asking the Sangha for approval to train for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.23
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmāya aṭṭhārasavassāya kumāribhūtāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ dadeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): If the Sangha is ready, it should give approval to the unmarried woman so-and-so, who is eighteen years old, to train for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.24
Pali: Esā ñatti. 
English (brahmali, published): This is the motion. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.25
Pali: Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.26
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya aṭṭhārasavassā kumāribhūtā saṅghaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): The unmarried woman so-and-so, who is eighteen years old, is asking the Sangha for approval to train for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.27
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmāya aṭṭhārasavassāya kumāribhūtāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiṁ deti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha gives approval to the unmarried woman so-and-so, who is eighteen years old, to train for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.28
Pali: Yassā ayyāya khamati itthannāmāya aṭṭhārasavassāya kumāribhūtāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammutiyā dānaṁ, sā tuṇhassa; 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who approves of giving approval to the unmarried woman so-and-so, who is eighteen years old, to train for two years in the six rules should remain silent. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.29
Pali: yassā nakkhamati, sā bhāseyya. 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who doesn’t approve should speak up. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.30
Pali: Dinnā saṅghena itthannāmāya aṭṭhārasavassāya kumāribhūtāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhāsammuti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha has given approval to the unmarried woman so-and-so, who is eighteen years old, to train for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.31
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha approves and is therefore silent. I will remember it thus.’ 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.32
Pali: Sā aṭṭhārasavassā kumāribhūtā evaṁ vadehīti vattabbā—
English (brahmali, published): That unmarried woman who is eighteen years old should be told to say this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.33
Pali: “pāṇātipātā veramaṇiṁ dve vassāni avītikkamma samādānaṁ samādiyāmi …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): ‘I undertake to abstain from killing living beings for two years without transgression. … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.34
Pali: vikālabhojanā veramaṇiṁ dve vassāni avītikkamma samādānaṁ samādiyāmī”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): I undertake to abstain from eating at the wrong time for two years without transgression.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.35
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā tā bhikkhuniyo anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā dubbharatāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): Then, after rebuking those nuns in many ways, the Buddha spoke in dispraise of being difficult to support … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.36
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:1.37.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu asikkhitasikkhaṁ vuṭṭhāpeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun gives the full admission to an unmarried woman who is more than twenty years old, but who has not trained for two years in the six rules, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.5
Pali: Paripuṇṇavīsativassā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Who is more than twenty years old: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.6
Pali: pattavīsativassā. 
English (brahmali, published): who has reached twenty years of age. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.7
Pali: Kumāribhūtā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): An unmarried woman: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.8
Pali: sāmaṇerī vuccati. 
English (brahmali, published): a novice nun is what is meant. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.9
Pali: Dve vassānīti 
English (brahmali, published): Two years: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.10
Pali: dve saṁvaccharāni. 
English (brahmali, published): two twelve-month periods. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.11
Pali: Asikkhitasikkhā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Who has not trained: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.12
Pali: sikkhā vā na dinnā hoti, dinnā vā sikkhā kupitā. 
English (brahmali, published): the training has not been given to her, or the training has been given to her, but she has failed in it. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.13
Pali: Vuṭṭhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Gives the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.14
Pali: upasampādeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.15
Pali: “Vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.16
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.17
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.18
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.19
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.20.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.21
Pali: Dhammakamme vematikā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.22
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as illegitimate, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.23
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as legitimate, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.24
Pali: Adhammakamme vematikā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.25
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.26.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.27
Pali: paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives the full admission to an unmarried woman who is more than twenty years old, and who has trained for two years in the six rules; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.28
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.29
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc72:2.30
Pali: Dutiyasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The second training rule is finished.

English (brahmali, published): The chapter on offenses entailing confession

English (brahmali, published): The subchapter on unmarried women 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:0.5
Pali: 73. Tatiyakumāribhūtasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 73. Ordaining a trained unmarried woman without approval 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in the Jeta Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpenti. 
English (brahmali, published): At that time the nuns were giving the full admission to unmarried women who were more than twenty years old and who had trained for two years in the six rules, but who had not been approved by the Sangha. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.3
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo evamāhaṁsu—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns said, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.4
Pali: “etha, sikkhamānā, imaṁ jānātha, imaṁ detha, imaṁ āharatha, iminā attho, imaṁ kappiyaṁ karothā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “Come, trainee nuns, find out about this,” “Give this,” “Bring this,” “There’s need for this,” or “Make this allowable.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.5
Pali: Tā evamāhaṁsu—
English (brahmali, published): But they replied, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.6
Pali: “na mayaṁ, ayye, sikkhamānā, bhikkhuniyo mayan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “Venerables, we’re not trainee nuns. We’re nuns.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.7
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized them, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpessantī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns give the full admission to unmarried women who are more than twenty years old and who have trained for two years in the six rules, but who haven’t been approved by the Sangha?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpentī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that nuns do this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ vuṭṭhāpessanti. 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.14
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): After rebuking them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.15
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—
English (brahmali, published): he gave a teaching and addressed the monks: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.16
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, paripuṇṇavīsativassāya kumāribhūtāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ dātuṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): “Monks, approval is required for the full admission of an unmarried woman who is more than twenty years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.17
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And it should be given like this. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.18
Pali: Tāya paripuṇṇavīsativassāya kumāribhūtāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā bhikkhunīnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—
English (brahmali, published): After approaching the Sangha of nuns, that unmarried woman who is more than twenty years old should arrange her upper robe over one shoulder and pay respect at the feet of the nuns. She should then squat on her heels, raise her joined palms, and say: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.19
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, ayye, itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya paripuṇṇavīsativassā kumāribhūtā dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā saṅghaṁ vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ yācāmī’ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Venerables, I, the unmarried woman so-and-so, who is more than twenty years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, ask the Sangha for approval to be fully admitted.’ 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.20
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And she should ask a second 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.21
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): and a third time. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.22
Pali: Byattāya bhikkhuniyā paṭibalāya saṅgho ñāpetabbo—
English (brahmali, published): A competent and capable nun should then inform the Sangha: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.23
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.24
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya paripuṇṇavīsativassā kumāribhūtā dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā saṅghaṁ vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): The unmarried woman so-and-so, who is more than twenty years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, is asking the Sangha for approval to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.25
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ saṅgho itthannāmāya paripuṇṇavīsativassāya kumāribhūtāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ dadeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): If the Sangha is ready, it should give approval for the unmarried woman so-and-so, who is more than twenty years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.26
Pali: Esā ñatti. 
English (brahmali, published): This is the motion. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.27
Pali: Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.28
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmā itthannāmāya ayyāya paripuṇṇavīsativassā kumāribhūtā dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā saṅghaṁ vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): The unmarried woman so-and-so, who is more than twenty years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, is asking the Sangha for approval to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.29
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmāya paripuṇṇavīsativassāya kumāribhūtāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya vuṭṭhānasammutiṁ deti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha gives approval for the unmarried woman so-and-so, who is more than twenty years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.30
Pali: Yassā ayyāya khamati itthannāmāya paripuṇṇavīsativassāya kumāribhūtāya dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya vuṭṭhānasammutiyā dānaṁ, sā tuṇhassa; 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who approves of giving approval for the unmarried woman so-and-so, who is more than twenty years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, to be fully admitted should remain silent. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.31
Pali: yassā nakkhamati, sā bhāseyya. 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who doesn’t approve should speak up.

English (brahmali, published): The Sangha has given approval for the unmarried woman so-and-so, who is more than twenty years old and who has trained for two years in the six rules under venerable so-and-so, to be fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:1.33
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti.
