Pali: “Vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.18
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.19
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.20
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.21
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.22.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.23
Pali: Dhammakamme vematikā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.24
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as illegitimate, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.25
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as legitimate, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.26
Pali: Adhammakamme vematikā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.27
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.28.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.29
Pali: paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ kumāribhūtaṁ dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhaṁ saṅghena sammataṁ vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives the full admission to an unmarried woman who is more than twenty years old, who has trained for two years in the six rules, and who has been approved by the Sangha; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.30
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.31
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc73:2.32
Pali: Tatiyasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The third training rule is finished.

Pali: 74. Ūnadvādasavassasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 74. Giving ordination while under twelve years’ seniority 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in the Jeta Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhuniyo ūnadvādasavassā vuṭṭhāpenti. 
English (brahmali, published): At that time nuns who had less than twelve years of seniority were giving the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:1.3
Pali: Tā bālā honti abyattā na jānanti kappiyaṁ vā akappiyaṁ vā. 
English (brahmali, published): They were ignorant and incompetent, and they did not know what was allowable and what was not. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:1.4
Pali: Saddhivihāriniyopi bālā honti abyattā; 
English (brahmali, published): And their students too were ignorant and incompetent, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:1.5
Pali: na jānanti kappiyaṁ vā akappiyaṁ vā. 
English (brahmali, published): and they too did not know what was allowable and what was not. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:1.6
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized them,

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:1.8

English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that nuns do this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:1.9
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:1.10
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:1.11

English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” …

English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this:

English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case.

English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc74:2.1.9

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.16

English (brahmali, published): “Monks, approval is required for a nun who has twelve years of seniority to give the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.17
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And the approval is to be given like this. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.18
Pali: Tāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya bhikkhuniyā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhunīnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—
English (brahmali, published): After approaching the Sangha of nuns, that nun who has twelve years of seniority should arrange her upper robe over one shoulder and pay respect at the feet of the senior nuns. She should then squat on her heels, raise her joined palms, and say: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.19
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, ayye, itthannāmā paripuṇṇadvādasavassā bhikkhunī saṅghaṁ vuṭṭhāpanasammutiṁ yācāmī’ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Venerables, I, the nun so-and-so who has twelve years of seniority, ask the Sangha for approval to give the full admission.’ 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.20
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And she should ask a second 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.21
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): and a third time. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.22
Pali: Sā bhikkhunī saṅghena paricchinditabbā— ‘byattāyaṁ bhikkhunī lajjinī’ti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha should then decide whether that nun is competent and has a sense of conscience. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.23
Pali: Sace bālā ca hoti alajjinī ca, na dātabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is ignorant and shameless, approval should not be given. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.24
Pali: Sace bālā hoti lajjinī, na dātabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is ignorant but has a sense of conscience, approval should not be given.

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.26
Pali: Sace byattā ca hoti lajjinī ca, dātabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is competent and has a sense of conscience, approval should be given. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.27
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbā. 
English (brahmali, published): And it is to be given like this. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.28

English (brahmali, published): A competent and capable nun should inform the Sangha: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.29
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.30
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmā paripuṇṇadvādasavassā bhikkhunī saṅghaṁ vuṭṭhāpanasammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): The nun so-and-so, who has twelve years of seniority, is asking the Sangha for approval to give the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.31
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya bhikkhuniyā vuṭṭhāpanasammutiṁ dadeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): If the Sangha is ready, it should give approval to the nun so-and-so, who has twelve years of seniority, to give the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.32
Pali: Esā ñatti. 
English (brahmali, published): This is the motion. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.33
Pali: Suṇātu me, ayye, saṅgho. 
English (brahmali, published): Please, venerables, I ask the Sangha to listen. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.34
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmā paripuṇṇadvādasavassā bhikkhunī saṅghaṁ vuṭṭhāpanasammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): The nun so-and-so, who has twelve years of seniority, is asking the Sangha for approval to give the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.35
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya bhikkhuniyā vuṭṭhāpanasammutiṁ deti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha gives approval to the nun so-and-so, who has twelve years of seniority, to give the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.36
Pali: Yassā ayyāya khamati itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya bhikkhuniyā vuṭṭhāpanasammutiyā dānaṁ, sā tuṇhassa; 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who approves of giving approval to the nun so-and-so, who has twelve years of seniority, to give the full admission should remain silent. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.37
Pali: yassā nakkhamati, sā bhāseyya. 
English (brahmali, published): Any nun who doesn’t approve should speak up. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.38
Pali: Dinnā saṅghena itthannāmāya paripuṇṇadvādasavassāya bhikkhuniyā vuṭṭhāpanasammuti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha has given approval to the nun so-and-so, who has twelve years of seniority, to give the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.39
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha approves and is therefore silent. I will remember it thus.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.40
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā tā bhikkhuniyo anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā dubbharatāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): Then, after rebuking those nuns in many ways, the Buddha spoke in dispraise of being difficult to support … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.41
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:1.42.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī paripuṇṇadvādasavassā saṅghena asammatā vuṭṭhāpeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun who has twelve years of seniority gives the full admission without approval from the Sangha, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.5
Pali: Paripuṇṇadvādasavassā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Who has twelve years of seniority: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.6
Pali: pattadvādasavassā. 
English (brahmali, published): who has reached twelve years of seniority. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.7
Pali: Asammatā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Without approval: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.8
Pali: ñattidutiyena kammena vuṭṭhāpanasammuti na dinnā hoti. 
English (brahmali, published): approval to give the full admission has not been given through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and one announcement. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.9
Pali: Vuṭṭhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Gives the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.10
Pali: upasampādeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.11
Pali: “Vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.12
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.13
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.14
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.15
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.16.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.17
Pali: Dhammakamme vematikā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.18
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññā vuṭṭhāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is a legitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as illegitimate, and she gives the full admission, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.19
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she perceives it as legitimate, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.20
Pali: Adhammakamme vematikā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, but she is unsure of it, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.21
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If it is an illegitimate legal procedure, and she perceives it as such, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.22.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.23
Pali: paripuṇṇadvādasavassā saṅghena sammatā vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she has twelve years of seniority, has been approved by the Sangha, and then gives the full admission; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.24
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.25
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc75:2.26
Pali: Pañcamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The fifth training rule is finished.

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:0.5
Pali: 76. Khīyanadhammasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 76. Agreeing to stop ordaining, but then criticizing it 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time when the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena caṇḍakāḷī bhikkhunī bhikkhunisaṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā vuṭṭhāpanasammutiṁ yācati. 
English (brahmali, published): the nun Caṇḍakāḷī approached the Sangha of nuns and asked for approval to give the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.3
Pali: Atha kho bhikkhunisaṅgho caṇḍakāḷiṁ bhikkhuniṁ paricchinditvā—
English (brahmali, published): The Sangha of nuns 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.4
Pali: “alaṁ tāva te, ayye, vuṭṭhāpitenā”ti, vuṭṭhāpanasammutiṁ na adāsi. 
English (brahmali, published): decided that she should not, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.5
Pali: Caṇḍakāḷī bhikkhunī “sādhū”ti paṭissuṇi. 
English (brahmali, published): and Caṇḍakāḷī consented. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.6
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhunisaṅgho aññāsaṁ bhikkhunīnaṁ vuṭṭhāpanasammutiṁ deti. 
English (brahmali, published): Soon afterwards the Sangha of nuns gave approval to other nuns to give the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.7
Pali: Caṇḍakāḷī bhikkhunī ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—
English (brahmali, published): Caṇḍakāḷī complained and criticized it, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.8
Pali: “ahameva nūna bālā, ahameva nūna alajjinī; 
English (brahmali, published): “So it seems I’m ignorant and shameless, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.9
Pali: yaṁ saṅgho aññāsaṁ bhikkhunīnaṁ vuṭṭhāpanasammutiṁ deti, mayhameva na detī”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): since the Sangha gives approval to other nuns, but not to me.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.10
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized her, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.11
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ayyā caṇḍakāḷī—
English (brahmali, published): “How could Venerable Caṇḍakāḷī 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.12
Pali: ‘alaṁ tāva te, ayye, vuṭṭhāpitenā’ti vuccamānā ‘sādhū’ti paṭissuṇitvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjissatī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): consent to not being approved to give the full admission, and then criticize it afterwards?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.13
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, caṇḍakāḷī bhikkhunī ‘alaṁ tāva te, ayye, vuṭṭhāpitenā’ti vuccamānā ‘sādhū’ti paṭissuṇitvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjatī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that the nun Caṇḍakāḷī did this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.14
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.15
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked her … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.16
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, caṇḍakāḷī bhikkhunī—
English (brahmali, published): “How could the nun Caṇḍakāḷī 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.17
Pali: ‘alaṁ tāva te, ayye, vuṭṭhāpitenā’ti vuccamānā ‘sādhū’ti paṭissuṇitvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjissati. 
English (brahmali, published): do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.18
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.19
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:1.20.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī—‘alaṁ tāva te, ayye, vuṭṭhāpitenā’ti vuccamānā ‘sādhū’ti paṭissuṇitvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun is told, “Venerable, you’ve given enough full admissions for now,” and she consents, saying, “Fine,” but then criticizes it afterwards, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.1.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.1.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.1.5
Pali: Alaṁ tāva te, ayye, vuṭṭhāpitenāti 
English (brahmali, published): “Venerable, you’ve given enough full admissions for now”: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.1.6
Pali: alaṁ tāva te, ayye, upasampāditena. 
English (brahmali, published): Venerable, you’ve given enough full ordinations for now. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.1.7
Pali: “Sādhū”ti paṭissuṇitvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she consents, saying, “Fine,” but then criticizes it afterwards, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.2.2
Pali: pakatiyā chandā dosā mohā bhayā karontaṁ khiyyati, 
English (brahmali, published): if she criticizes one who regularly acts out of favoritism, ill will, confusion, or fear; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.2.3
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.2.4
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc76:2.2.5
Pali: Chaṭṭhasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The sixth training rule is finished.

Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 
English (brahmali, published): Theravāda Collection on Monastic Law

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:0.5
Pali: 77. Sikkhamāna-navuṭṭhāpanasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 77. Not ordaining a trainee after promising 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time when the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā sikkhamānā thullanandaṁ bhikkhuniṁ upasaṅkamitvā upasampadaṁ yāci. 
English (brahmali, published): a trainee nun went to the nun Thullanandā and asked her for the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.3
Pali: Thullanandā bhikkhunī taṁ sikkhamānaṁ—
English (brahmali, published): Thullanandā told her, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.4
Pali: “sace me tvaṁ, ayye, cīvaraṁ dassasi evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti vatvā, neva vuṭṭhāpeti na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ karoti. 
English (brahmali, published): “If you give me a robe, venerable, I’ll give you the full admission.” But she neither gave her the full admission nor made any effort to have her fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.5
Pali: Atha kho sā sikkhamānā bhikkhunīnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 
English (brahmali, published): That trainee nun told the nuns what had happened. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.6

English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized her,

English (brahmali, published): “How could Venerable Thullanandā say that to a trainee nun 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.8
Pali: ‘sace me tvaṁ, ayye, cīvaraṁ dassasi evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī’ti vatvā, neva vuṭṭhāpessati na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ karissatī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): and then neither give her the full admission nor make any effort to have her fully admitted?” …

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.10
Pali: ‘sace me tvaṁ, ayye, cīvaraṁ dassasi evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī’ti vatvā, neva vuṭṭhāpeti na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ karotī”ti? 
English: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.11
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.”

English (brahmali, published): “How could the nun Thullanandā act in this way? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.14
Pali: ‘sace me tvaṁ, ayye, cīvaraṁ dassasi evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī’ti vatvā, neva vuṭṭhāpessati na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ karissati. 
English:

English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.16
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:1.17.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī sikkhamānaṁ—‘sace me tvaṁ, ayye, cīvaraṁ dassasi, evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī’ti vatvā, sā pacchā anantarāyikinī neva vuṭṭhāpeyya na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ kareyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun tells a trainee nun, “If you give me a robe, venerable, I’ll give you the full admission,” but she then neither gives her the full admission nor makes any effort to have her fully admitted, then, if there were no obstacles, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.5
Pali: Sikkhamānā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): A trainee nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.6
Pali: dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā. 
English (brahmali, published): one who has trained for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.7
Pali: Sace me tvaṁ, ayye, cīvaraṁ dassasi evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmīti 
English (brahmali, published): “If you give me a robe, venerable, I’ll give you the full admission”: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.8
Pali: evāhaṁ taṁ upasampādessāmi. 
English (brahmali, published): I’ll give you the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.9
Pali: Sā pacchā anantarāyikinīti 
English (brahmali, published): Then, if there were no obstacles: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.10
Pali: asati antarāye. 
English (brahmali, published): when there is no obstacle. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.11
Pali: Neva vuṭṭhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): She neither gives her the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.12
Pali: na sayaṁ vuṭṭhāpeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): does not herself give her the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.13
Pali: Na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ kareyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Nor makes any effort to have her fully admitted: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.14
Pali: na aññaṁ āṇāpeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): does not ask anyone else to give her the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.1.15
Pali: “Neva vuṭṭhāpessāmi na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ karissāmī”ti dhuraṁ nikkhittamatte āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she thinks, “I’ll neither give her the full admission nor make any effort to have her fully admitted,” then by the mere fact of abandoning her duty, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.2.2
Pali: sati antarāye, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an obstacle; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.2.3
Pali: pariyesitvā na labhati, 
English (brahmali, published): if she searches for someone to give her the full ordination, but is unable to find anyone; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.2.4
Pali: gilānāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is sick; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.2.5
Pali: āpadāsu, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an emergency; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.2.6
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.2.7
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc77:2.2.8
Pali: Sattamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The seventh training rule is finished.

Pali: Kumāribhūtavagga 
English (brahmali, published): The subchapter on unmarried women 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:0.5
Pali: 78. Dutiyasikkhamāna-navuṭṭhāpanasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 78. Not ordaining a trainee who has followed one 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time when the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā sikkhamānā thullanandaṁ bhikkhuniṁ upasaṅkamitvā upasampadaṁ yāci. 
English (brahmali, published): a trainee nun went to the nun Thullanandā and asked for the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.3
Pali: Thullanandā bhikkhunī taṁ sikkhamānaṁ “sace maṁ tvaṁ, ayye, dve vassāni anubandhissasi evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti vatvā, neva vuṭṭhāpeti na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ karoti. 
English (brahmali, published): Thullanandā told her, “If you follow me for two years, venerable, I’ll give you the full admission.” But she neither gave her the full admission nor made any effort to have her fully admitted. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.4
Pali: Atha kho sā sikkhamānā bhikkhunīnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 
English (brahmali, published): That trainee nun told the nuns what had happened. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.5
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized her, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.6
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ayyā thullanandā sikkhamānaṁ—
English (brahmali, published): “How could Venerable Thullanandā say that to a trainee nun 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.7
Pali: ‘sace maṁ tvaṁ, ayye, dve vassāni anubandhissasi evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī’ti vatvā, neva vuṭṭhāpessati na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ karissatī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): and then neither give her the full admission nor make any effort to have her fully admitted?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, thullanandā bhikkhunī sikkhamānaṁ—
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that the nun Thullanandā did this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.9
Pali: ‘sace maṁ tvaṁ, ayye, dve vassāni anubandhissasi evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī’ti vatvā, neva vuṭṭhāpeti na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ karotī”ti? 
English: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked her … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, thullanandā bhikkhunī sikkhamānaṁ—
English (brahmali, published): “How could the nun Thullanandā act in this way? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.13
Pali: ‘sace maṁ tvaṁ, ayye, dve vassāni anubandhissasi evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī’ti vatvā, neva vuṭṭhāpessati na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ karissati. 
English: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.14
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.15
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:1.16.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī sikkhamānaṁ— ‘sace maṁ tvaṁ, ayye, dve vassāni anubandhissasi evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī’ti vatvā, sā pacchā anantarāyikinī neva vuṭṭhāpeyya na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ kareyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun tells a trainee nun, “If you follow me for two years, venerable, I’ll give you the full admission,” but she then neither gives her the full admission nor makes any effort to have her fully admitted, then, if there were no obstacles, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.5
Pali: Sikkhamānā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): A trainee nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.6
Pali: dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā. 
English (brahmali, published): one who has trained for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.7
Pali: Sace maṁ tvaṁ, ayye, dve vassāni anubandhissasīti 
English (brahmali, published): “If you follow me for two years, venerable”: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.8
Pali: dve saṁvaccharāni upaṭṭhahissasi. 
English (brahmali, published): if you attend on me for two twelve-month periods. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.9
Pali: Evāhaṁ taṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmīti 
English (brahmali, published): “I’ll give you the full admission”: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.10
Pali: evāhaṁ taṁ upasampādessāmi. 
English (brahmali, published): I’ll give you the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.11
Pali: Sā pacchā anantarāyikinīti 
English (brahmali, published): Then, if there were no obstacles: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.12
Pali: asati antarāye. 
English (brahmali, published): when there is no obstacle. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.13
Pali: Neva vuṭṭhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): She neither gives her the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.14
Pali: na sayaṁ vuṭṭhāpeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): she does not herself give her the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.15
Pali: Na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ kareyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Nor makes any effort to have her fully admitted: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.16
Pali: na aññaṁ āṇāpeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): she does not ask anyone else to give her the full admission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.17
Pali: “Neva vuṭṭhāpessāmi na vuṭṭhāpanāya ussukkaṁ karissāmī”ti dhuraṁ nikkhittamatte āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she thinks, “I’ll neither give her the full admission nor make any effort to have her fully admitted,” then by the mere fact of abandoning her duty, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.18.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.19
Pali: sati antarāye, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an obstacle; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.20
Pali: pariyesitvā na labhati, 
English (brahmali, published): if she searches for someone to give her the full ordination, but is unable to find anyone; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.21
Pali: gilānāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is sick; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.22
Pali: āpadāsu, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an emergency; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.23
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.24
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc78:2.25
Pali: Aṭṭhamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The eighth training rule is finished.

Pali: 79. Sokāvāsasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 79. Ordaining one who is difficult to live with

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:1.11.1

English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun gives the full admission to a trainee nun who is socializing with men and boys and who is temperamental and difficult to live with, she commits an offense entailing confession.’”

Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A:

English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.3

English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.5
Pali: Puriso nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Men: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.6
Pali: pattavīsativasso. 
English (brahmali, published): those who have reached twenty years of age. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.7
Pali: Kumārako nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Boys: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.8
Pali: appattavīsativasso. 
English (brahmali, published): those who have not reached twenty years of age. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.9
Pali: Saṁsaṭṭhā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Socializing: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.10
Pali: ananulomikena kāyikavācasikena saṁsaṭṭhā. 
English (brahmali, published): she socializes with improper bodily and verbal actions. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.11
Pali: Caṇḍī nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Temperamental: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.12
Pali: kodhanā vuccati. 
English (brahmali, published): angry is what is meant. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.13
Pali: Sokāvāsā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Difficult to live with: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.14
Pali: paresaṁ dukkhaṁ uppādeti, sokaṁ āvisati. 
English (brahmali, published): she causes suffering to others, and grieves herself. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.15
Pali: Sikkhamānā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): A trainee nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.16
Pali: dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā. 
English (brahmali, published): one who has trained for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.17
Pali: Vuṭṭhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Gives the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.18
Pali: upasampādeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.19
Pali: “Vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.20
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.21
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.22
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyāya āpatti pācittiyassa; 
English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.1.23
Pali: gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.2.2
Pali: ajānantī vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives her the full admission without knowing what she is like; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.2.3
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.2.4
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc79:2.2.5
Pali: Navamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The ninth training rule is finished.

English (brahmali, published): The subchapter on unmarried women 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:0.5
Pali: 80. Ananuññātasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 80. Ordaining without permission from family 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in the Jeta Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena thullanandā bhikkhunī mātāpitūhipi sāmikenapi ananuññātaṁ sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpeti. 
English (brahmali, published): At that time the nun Thullanandā gave the full admission to a trainee nun who had neither been given permission by her parents nor by her husband. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.3
Pali: Mātāpitaropi sāmikopi ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): They complained and criticized her, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ayyā thullanandā amhehi ananuññātaṁ sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpessatī”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “How could Venerable Thullanandā give the full admission to that trainee nun without our permission?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.5
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhuniyo mātāpitūnampi sāmikassapi ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The nuns heard the complaints of the parents and the husband. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.6
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized her, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ayyā thullanandā mātāpitūhipi sāmikenapi ananuññātaṁ sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpessatī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How could Venerable Thullanandā give the full admission to a trainee nun who has neither permission from her parents nor her husband?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, thullanandā bhikkhunī, mātāpitūhipi sāmikenapi ananuññātaṁ sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpetī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that the nun Thullanandā did this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.9
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.10
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked her … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.11

English (brahmali, published): “How could the nun Thullanandā do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.12
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.13
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:1.14.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī mātāpitūhi vā sāmikena vā ananuññātaṁ sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun gives the full admission to a trainee nun who has not been given permission by her parents or her husband, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.5
Pali: Mātāpitaro nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Parents: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.6
Pali: janakā vuccanti. 
English (brahmali, published): the biological parents is what is meant. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.7
Pali: Sāmiko nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Husband: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.8
Pali: yena pariggahitā hoti. 
English (brahmali, published): he who possesses her. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.9
Pali: Ananuññātāti 
English (brahmali, published): Who has not been given permission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.10
Pali: anāpucchā. 
English (brahmali, published): who has not asked permission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.11
Pali: Sikkhamānā nāma 
English (brahmali, published): A trainee nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.12
Pali: dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhā. 
English (brahmali, published): one who has trained for two years in the six rules. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.13
Pali: Vuṭṭhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Gives the full admission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.14
Pali: upasampādeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.15
Pali: “Vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.16
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.17
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.18
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.1.19
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.2.2
Pali: ajānantī vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives her the full admission without knowing; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.2.3
Pali: apaloketvā vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives her the full admission after permission has been given; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.2.4
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.2.5
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc80:2.2.6
Pali: Dasamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The tenth training rule is finished.

English (brahmali, published): The chapter on offenses entailing confession

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:0.5
Pali: 81. Pārivāsikasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 81. Ordaining after consent expires 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time when the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena thullanandā bhikkhunī—
English (brahmali, published): the nun Thullanandā 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.3
Pali: “sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti there bhikkhū sannipātetvā pahūtaṁ khādanīyaṁ bhojanīyaṁ passitvā—
English (brahmali, published): had gathered a group of senior monks, intending to give the full admission to a trainee nun. But after seeing much fresh and cooked food, she dismissed the senior monks, saying, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.4
Pali: “na tāvāhaṁ, ayyā, sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti there bhikkhū uyyojetvā devadattaṁ kokālikaṁ kaṭamodakatissakaṁ khaṇḍadeviyā puttaṁ samuddadattaṁ sannipātetvā sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpesi. 
English (brahmali, published): “Venerables, I won’t give the full admission to the trainee nun just yet.” She then gathered Devadatta, Kokālika, Kaṭamodakatissaka, Khaṇḍadeviyāputta, and Samuddadatta, and gave the full admission to that trainee nun. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.5
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized her, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.6
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ayyā thullanandā pārivāsikachandadānena sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpessatī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How could Venerable Thullanandā give the full admission to a trainee nun when the given consent had expired?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, thullanandā bhikkhunī pārivāsikachandadānena sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpetī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that the nun Thullanandā did this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked her … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.10
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, thullanandā bhikkhunī pārivāsikachandadānena sikkhamānaṁ vuṭṭhāpessati. 
English (brahmali, published): “How could the nun Thullanandā do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.11
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.12

English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:1.13.1

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc81:2.1.5
Pali: Pārivāsikachandadānenāti

English (brahmali, published): The nuns heard the complaints of those people. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc82:1.6

Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhuniyo ekaṁ vassaṁ dve vuṭṭhāpessantī”ti …pe…

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:1.10
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo ekaṁ vassaṁ dve vuṭṭhāpentī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that the nuns do this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:1.11
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:1.12
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:1.13
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo ekaṁ vassaṁ dve vuṭṭhāpessanti. 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:1.14
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:1.15
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:1.16.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī ekaṁ vassaṁ dve vuṭṭhāpeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun gives the full admission to two women in the same year, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.5
Pali: Ekaṁ vassanti 
English (brahmali, published): In the same year: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.6
Pali: ekaṁ saṁvaccharaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): in one twelve-month period. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.7
Pali: Dve vuṭṭhāpeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Gives the full admission to two women: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.8
Pali: dve upasampādeyya. 
English (brahmali, published): gives the full ordination to two women. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.9
Pali: “Dve vuṭṭhāpessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariniṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If, intending to give the full admission to two women, she searches for a group, a teacher, a bowl, or a robe, or she establishes a monastery zone, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.10
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): After the motion, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.11
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 
English (brahmali, published): After each of the first two announcements, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.12
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): When the last announcement is finished, the preceptor commits an offense entailing confession, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.1.13
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariniyā ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): and the group and the teacher commit an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.2.2
Pali: ekantarikaṁ ekaṁ vuṭṭhāpeti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gives the full admission to one woman every other year; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.2.3
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.2.4
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.2.5
Pali: Terasamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The thirteenth training rule is finished. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc83:2.2.6
Pali: Kumāribhūtavaggo aṭṭhamo. 
English (brahmali, published): The eighth subchapter on unmarried women is finished.

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:1.1.1

English (brahmali, published): Who is sick:

Pali: yassā vinā chattupāhanaṁ na phāsu hoti.

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.1.9
Pali: Chattaṁ nāma 
English (brahmali, published): A sunshade: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.1.10
Pali: tīṇi chattāni— setacchattaṁ, kilañjacchattaṁ, paṇṇacchattaṁ maṇḍalabaddhaṁ salākabaddhaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): there are three kinds of sunshades: the white sunshade, the reed sunshade, the leaf sunshade. They are bound at the rim and bound at the ribs. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.1.11
Pali: Dhāreyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Uses: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.1.12
Pali: sakimpi dhāreti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): if she uses them even once, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.2.1
Pali: Agilānā agilānasaññā chattupāhanaṁ dhāreti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is not sick, and she does not perceive herself as sick, and she uses a sunshade and sandals, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.2.2
Pali: Agilānā vematikā chattupāhanaṁ dhāreti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is not sick, but she is unsure of it, and she uses a sunshade and sandals, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.2.3
Pali: Agilānā gilānasaññā chattupāhanaṁ dhāreti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is not sick, but she perceives herself as sick, and she uses a sunshade and sandals, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.2.4
Pali: Chattaṁ dhāreti na upāhanaṁ, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she uses a sunshade, but not sandals, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.2.5
Pali: Upāhanaṁ dhāreti na chattaṁ, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she uses sandals, but not a sunshade, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.2.6
Pali: Gilānā agilānasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is sick, but she does not perceive herself as sick, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.2.7
Pali: Gilānā vematikā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is sick, but she is unsure of it, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.2.8
Pali: Gilānā gilānasaññā, anāpatti. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is sick, and she perceives herself as sick, there is no offense. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.3.2
Pali: gilānāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is sick; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.3.3
Pali: ārāme ārāmūpacāre dhāreti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she uses them in a monastery or in the vicinity of a monastery; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.3.4
Pali: āpadāsu, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an emergency; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.3.5
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.3.6
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc84:2.3.7
Pali: Paṭhamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The first training rule is finished.

Pali: Yānaṁ nāma 
English (brahmali, published): A vehicle: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.1.10
Pali: vayhaṁ ratho sakaṭaṁ sandamānikā sivikā pāṭaṅkī. 
English (brahmali, published): a wagon, a carriage, a cart, a chariot, a palanquin, a litter. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.1.11
Pali: Yāyeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Travels: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.1.12
Pali: sakimpi yānena yāyati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): if she travels in a vehicle even once, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.2.1
Pali: Agilānā agilānasaññā yānena yāyati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is not sick, and she does not perceive herself as sick, and she travels in a vehicle, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.2.2
Pali: Agilānā vematikā yānena yāyati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is not sick, but she is unsure of it, and she travels in a vehicle, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.2.3
Pali: Agilānā gilānasaññā yānena yāyati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is not sick, but she perceives herself as sick, and she travels in a vehicle, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.2.4
Pali: Gilānā agilānasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is sick, but she does not perceive herself as sick, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.2.5
Pali: Gilānā vematikā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is sick, but she is unsure of it, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.2.6
Pali: Gilānā gilānasaññā, anāpatti. 
English (brahmali, published): If she is sick, and she perceives herself as sick, there is no offense. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.3.2
Pali: gilānāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is sick; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.3.3
Pali: āpadāsu, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an emergency; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.3.4
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.3.5
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc85:2.3.6
Pali: Dutiyasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The second training rule is finished.

Pali: 86. Saṅghāṇisikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 86. Wearing a hip ornament 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time when the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā bhikkhunī aññatarissā itthiyā kulūpikā hoti. 
English (brahmali, published): there was a nun was associating with the family of a certain woman. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.3
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī taṁ bhikkhuniṁ etadavoca—
English (brahmali, published): That woman said to that nun, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.4
Pali: “handāyye, imaṁ saṅghāṇiṁ amukāya nāma itthiyā dehī”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “Venerable, please give this hip ornament to such-and-such a woman.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.5
Pali: Atha kho sā bhikkhunī—
English (brahmali, published): The nun thought, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.6
Pali: “sacāhaṁ pattena ādāya gacchāmi vissaro me bhavissatī”ti paṭimuñcitvā agamāsi. 
English (brahmali, published): “If I carry it in my almsbowl, I’ll get into trouble,” and so she put it on and then left. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.7
Pali: Tassā rathikāya suttake chinne vippakiriyiṁsu. 
English (brahmali, published): While she was walking along a street the threads snapped and were scattered all over. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.8
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): People complained and criticized her, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.9
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhuniyo saṅghāṇiṁ dhāressanti, seyyathāpi gihiniyo kāmabhoginiyo”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns wear hip ornaments? They’re just like householders who indulge in worldly pleasures!” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.10
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhuniyo tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The nuns heard the complaints of those people. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.11
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized her, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.12
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhunī saṅghāṇiṁ dhāressatī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How could a nun wear a hip ornament?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.13
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhunī saṅghāṇiṁ dhāretī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that a nun did this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.14
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.15
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked her … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.16
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, bhikkhunī saṅghāṇiṁ dhāressati. 
English (brahmali, published): “How could a nun do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.17
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.18
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:1.19.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī saṅghāṇiṁ dhāreyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun wears a hip ornament, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.1.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.1.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.1.5
Pali: Saṅghāṇi nāma 
English (brahmali, published): A hip ornament: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.1.6
Pali: yā kāci kaṭūpagā. 
English (brahmali, published): whatever goes on the hip. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.1.7
Pali: Dhāreyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Wears: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.1.8
Pali: sakimpi dhāreti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): if she wears it even once, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.2.2
Pali: ābādhappaccayā, 
English (brahmali, published): if she wears it because she is sick; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.2.3
Pali: kaṭisuttakaṁ dhāreti, 
English (brahmali, published): if she wears a girdle; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.2.4
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.2.5
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc86:2.2.6
Pali: Tatiyasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The third training rule is finished.

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc88:2.2.4
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc88:2.2.5
Pali: Pañcamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The fifth training rule is finished.

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.1

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.3

English (brahmali, published): People complained and criticized them, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.4

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.5

English (brahmali, published): The nuns heard the complaints of those people. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.6
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized them, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhuniyo vāsitakena piññākena nahāyissantī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How can the nuns from the group of six bathe with scented sesame paste?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, chabbaggiyā bhikkhuniyo vāsitakena piññākena nahāyantī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that those nuns do this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.9
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.10
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.11

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.12
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.13
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:1.14.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī vāsitakena piññākena nahāyeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun bathes with scented sesame paste, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.1.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.1.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.1.5
Pali: Vāsitakaṁ nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Scented: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.1.6
Pali: yaṁ kiñci gandhavāsitakaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): any kind of scent. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.1.7
Pali: Piññākaṁ nāma 
English (brahmali, published): Sesame paste: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.1.8
Pali: tilapiṭṭhaṁ vuccati. 
English (brahmali, published): ground sesame is what is meant. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.1.9
Pali: Nahāyeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Bathes: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.1.10
Pali: nahāyati. Payoge dukkaṭaṁ, nahānapariyosāne āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): is bathing. For the effort there is an act of wrong conduct. At the end of the bath, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.2.2
Pali: ābādhappaccayā, 
English (brahmali, published): if she does it because she is sick; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.2.3
Pali: pakatipiññākena nahāyati, 
English (brahmali, published): if she bathes with unscented sesame paste; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.2.4
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.2.5
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc89:2.2.6
Pali: Chaṭṭhasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The sixth training rule is finished.

English (brahmali, published): The subchapter on sunshades and sandals 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:0.5
Pali: 94. Anāpucchāsikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 94. Sitting in front without permission 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time when the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhuniyo bhikkhussa purato anāpucchā āsane nisīdanti. 
English (brahmali, published): nuns sat down on seats in front of a monk without asking permission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.3
Pali: Bhikkhū ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The monks complained and criticized them, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhuniyo bhikkhussa purato anāpucchā āsane nisīdissantī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns sit down on seats in front of a monk without asking permission?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.5
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo bhikkhussa purato anāpucchā āsane nisīdantī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that nuns do this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.6
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.7
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked them … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.8
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo bhikkhussa purato anāpucchā āsane nisīdissanti. 
English (brahmali, published): “How can nuns do this? 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.9
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): This will affect people’s confidence …” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.10
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniyo imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddisantu—
English (brahmali, published): “And, monks, the nuns should recite this training rule like this: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:1.11.1
Pali: “Yā pana bhikkhunī bhikkhussa purato anāpucchā āsane nisīdeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): ‘If a nun sits down on a seat in front of a monk without asking permission, she commits an offense entailing confession.’” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.1.1
Pali: Yā panāti 
English (brahmali, published): A: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.1.2
Pali: yā yādisā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): whoever … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhunīti 
English (brahmali, published): Nun: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetā bhikkhunīti. 
English (brahmali, published): … The nun who has been given the full ordination in unanimity by both Sanghas through a legal procedure consisting of one motion and three announcements that is irreversible and fit to stand—this sort of nun is meant in this case. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhussa puratoti 
English (brahmali, published): In front of a monk: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.1.6
Pali: upasampannassa purato. 
English (brahmali, published): in front of one who is fully ordained. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.1.7
Pali: Anāpucchāti 
English (brahmali, published): Without asking permission: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.1.8
Pali: anapaloketvā. 
English (brahmali, published): without getting permission. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.1.9
Pali: Āsane nisīdeyyāti 
English (brahmali, published): Sits down on a seat: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.1.10
Pali: antamaso chamāyapi nisīdati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): even if she sits down on the ground, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpucchite anāpucchitasaññā āsane nisīdati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she has not asked permission, and she does not perceive that she has, and she sits down on a seat, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.2.2
Pali: Anāpucchite vematikā āsane nisīdati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she has not asked permission, but she is unsure of it, and she sits down on a seat, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.2.3
Pali: Anāpucchite āpucchitasaññā āsane nisīdati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she has not asked permission, but she perceives that she has, and she sits down on a seat, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.2.4
Pali: Āpucchite anāpucchitasaññā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she has asked permission, but she does not perceive that she has, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.2.5
Pali: Āpucchite vematikā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she has asked permission, but she is unsure of it, she commits an offense of wrong conduct. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.2.6
Pali: Āpucchite āpucchitasaññā, anāpatti. 
English (brahmali, published): If she has asked permission, and she perceives that she has, there is no offense. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.3.2
Pali: āpucchā āsane nisīdati, 
English (brahmali, published): if she sits down on the seat after asking permission; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.3.3
Pali: gilānāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is sick; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.3.4
Pali: āpadāsu, 
English (brahmali, published): if there is an emergency; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.3.5
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.3.6
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc94:2.3.7
Pali: Ekādasamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The eleventh training rule is finished.

English (brahmali, published): Asks a question: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.1.10
Pali: suttante okāsaṁ kārāpetvā vinayaṁ vā abhidhammaṁ vā pucchati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): if she gets permission to ask about the discourses, but she asks about the Monastic Law or philosophy, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.1.11
Pali: Vinaye okāsaṁ kārāpetvā suttantaṁ vā abhidhammaṁ vā pucchati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she gets permission to ask about the Monastic Law, but she asks about the discourses or philosophy, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.1.12
Pali: Abhidhamme okāsaṁ kārāpetvā suttantaṁ vā vinayaṁ vā pucchati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she gets permission to ask about philosophy, but she asks about the discourses or the Monastic Law, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.2.1
Pali: Anāpucchite anāpucchitasaññā pañhaṁ pucchati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she has not asked permission, and she does not perceive that she has, and she asks a question, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.2.2
Pali: Anāpucchite vematikā pañhaṁ pucchati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she has not asked permission, but she is unsure of it, and she asks a question, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.2.3
Pali: Anāpucchite āpucchitasaññā pañhaṁ pucchati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 
English (brahmali, published): If she has not asked permission, but she perceives that she has, and she asks a question, she commits an offense entailing confession. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.2.4

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.2.5

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.2.6
Pali: Āpucchite āpucchitasaññā, anāpatti. 
English (brahmali, published): If she has asked permission, and she perceives that she has, there is no offense. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—
English (brahmali, published): There is no offense: 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.3.2
Pali: okāsaṁ kārāpetvā pucchati, 
English (brahmali, published): if she asks after getting permission; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.3.3
Pali: anodissa okāsaṁ kārāpetvā yattha katthaci pucchati, 
English (brahmali, published): if she gets permission, but not in regard to a specific subject, and she then asks about any subject; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.3.4
Pali: ummattikāya, 
English (brahmali, published): if she is insane; 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.3.5
Pali: ādikammikāyāti. 
English (brahmali, published): if she is the first offender. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc95:2.3.6
Pali: Dvādasamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 
English (brahmali, published): The twelfth training rule is finished.

Pali: 96. Asaṅkaccikasikkhāpada 
English (brahmali, published): 96. Not wearing a chest wrap 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 
English (brahmali, published): At one time when the Buddha was staying at Sāvatthī in Anāthapiṇḍika’s Monastery, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā bhikkhunī asaṅkaccikā gāmaṁ piṇḍāya pāvisi. 
English (brahmali, published): a nun had gone to the village for alms without wearing her chest wrap. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.3
Pali: Tassā rathikāya vātamaṇḍalikā saṅghāṭiyo ukkhipiṁsu. 
English (brahmali, published): While she was walking along a street, a whirlwind lifted up her upper robes. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.4
Pali: Manussā ukkuṭṭhiṁ akaṁsu—
English (brahmali, published): People shouted out, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.5
Pali: “sundarā ayyāya thanudarā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “She has beautiful breasts and belly!” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.6
Pali: Sā bhikkhunī tehi manussehi uppaṇḍiyamānā maṅku ahosi. 
English (brahmali, published): Because she was teased by those people, she felt humiliated. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.7
Pali: Atha kho sā bhikkhunī upassayaṁ gantvā bhikkhunīnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 
English (brahmali, published): After returning to the nunnery, she told the nuns what had happened. 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.8
Pali: Yā tā bhikkhuniyo appicchā …pe… tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—
English (brahmali, published): The nuns of few desires complained and criticized her, 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.9
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhunī asaṅkaccikā gāmaṁ pavisissatī”ti …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): “How could a nun enter an inhabited area without wearing her chest wrap?” … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.10
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhunī asaṅkaccikā gāmaṁ pāvisī”ti? 
English (brahmali, published): “Is it true, monks, that a nun did this?” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.11
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 
English (brahmali, published): “It’s true, sir.” 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.12
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 
English (brahmali, published): The Buddha rebuked her … 

pli-tv-bi-vb-pc96:1.13
